# HPD.ML.DataSources.CsvOptions

- Package: `HPD-ML-DataSources` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.DataSources`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.DataSources`
- Kind: `class`

Configuration for CSV loading.

```csharp
public sealed class CsvOptions : System.IEquatable<HPD.ML.DataSources.CsvOptions>
```

## Properties

### CommentPrefix

```csharp
public System.Nullable<char> CommentPrefix { get; init; }
```

Comment prefix. Lines starting with this are skipped. Default: null.

### Encoding

```csharp
public System.Text.Encoding Encoding { get; init; }
```

File encoding. Default: UTF-8.

### HasHeader

```csharp
public bool HasHeader { get; init; }
```

Whether the first row contains column names. Default: true.

### InferenceScanRows

```csharp
public int InferenceScanRows { get; init; }
```

Number of rows to scan for type inference. Default: 100. Set to 0 to scan all rows.

### MaxRows

```csharp
public System.Nullable<int> MaxRows { get; init; }
```

Maximum rows to read. Default: null (all rows).

### MissingValuePolicy

```csharp
public HPD.ML.DataSources.MissingValuePolicy MissingValuePolicy { get; init; }
```

How to handle missing/empty values.

### Quote

```csharp
public char Quote { get; init; }
```

Quote character for escaping. Default: '"'.

### Separator

```csharp
public char Separator { get; init; }
```

Column delimiter. Default: ','.

### SkipRows

```csharp
public int SkipRows { get; init; }
```

Number of rows to skip from the start (after header). Default: 0.

### TypeHints

```csharp
public System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary<string, System.Type>? TypeHints { get; init; }
```

Explicit type hints per column name. Overrides inference.
